reason: The text fragment does not describe the Hebrews being captive in a foreign land with elders as their leadership. Instead, it narrates the story of Abram (later known as Abraham) leaving his homeland to go to the land of Canaan as instructed by the LORD. The text focuses on the promise of God to make a great nation out of Abram and bless him, rather than depicting the Hebrews as captives.
